title: Argyrocome retorta
intro: Argyrocome retorta, also known as "turnsole," is a flowering plant species native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Argyrocome retorta include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Argyrocome retorta include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are used to harness its therapeutic potential.
